images.label: Jacob resting at night with a glowing stairway to heaven
images.prompt_used: Create a symbolic cinematic scene of Jacob's dream at Bethel: a lone ancient traveler resting at night in a desert landscape, with a glowing stairway or ladder reaching upward into heavenly light, and luminous angelic figures ascending and descending. Premium semi-realistic painterly style. Square or near-square composition. No text. No logos.
images.alt: Ancient traveler resting at night while a glowing stairway rises into heaven

images.label: An upright stone marker in the desert at dawn
images.prompt_used: Create an ancient upright stone marker in a desert setting at dawn, suggesting Jacob setting up the stone at Bethel. Quiet sacred mood, warm light, premium semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Upright stone marker in a desert setting at dawn

images.label: Shepherds and flocks gathered around a well
images.prompt_used: Create an ancient well in open countryside with shepherds and flocks gathered nearby. Clear focal well. Warm natural light. Semi-realistic painterly Bible learning app style. Square or near-square composition. No text. No logos.
images.alt: Ancient well with shepherds and flocks nearby

images.label: Flocks of speckled and spotted animals in pasture
